title: About
description: Specialist fire-sealing and technical-insulation contractor serving owners and builders across Iceland since 2011.
kicker: A specialist fire-sealing and technical-insulation contractor serving Iceland since 2011.

story.label: Our story
story.heading: Founded to seal correctly — and document it.
paragraphs: Brunaþéttingar was founded in 2011 by four fire-sealing tradesmen who saw the gap between how the work was done and how it should be done.

Today the company runs ~150 projects a year, from single-flat retrofits to the largest hospitals in the country, with a small permanent crew and a documentation system that ties every seal back to a drawing and a certification.
We don't do fire engineering — we install what fire engineers spec, and we report it back end-to-end.
story.signatureQuote: "Every seal goes on a drawing. Every drawing goes in the report. That's the whole company."

philosophy.label: Our principles
philosophy.heading: Six guiding lights for every project.
philosophy.lead: These are the rules we follow, regardless of project size or schedule pressure.

team.label: The team
team.heading: A small team that knows every project.

cta.heading: Ready to start your project? Get in touch.
